title: Anthropic's Model Context Protocol crosses 97 million installs, becomes foundati

structured_analysis.background: HackerNews 于 2026-04-02 发布相关动态。
structured_analysis.key_action: Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP) crossed 97 million monthly SDK downloads in March 2026, ach
structured_analysis.technical_implication: From approximately 2 million installs at launch in November 2024, MCP reached comparable scale in just 16 months

trend_insight: 产品发布正在强调可用性、工具调用与企业场景落地。
risk_or_opportunity: 若能力稳定并形成生态支持，该方向有机会快速进入实际落地阶段。
original_title: Anthropic's Model Context Protocol crosses 97 million installs, becomes foundation layer for agentic AI
